[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 1/29 (Mon), Commissions rewards will be tripled! 
Don't miss out this chance to get Activity Reports and Credit Points!

🗓️Period: 1/29 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 2/5 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)![MOXHdLRCMoj1EwymjDlB0cg8oftgpFb2.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/MOXHdLRCMoj1EwymjDlB0cg8oftgpFb2.jpg)
